retry_reason: Not a wrapper; function fail results from allocation failures or init failures which may be retried if memory becomes available, but the primary purpose is not refcount management.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to initialize an auxiliary device and allocate multiple auxiliary structures (aux_priv, auxr_dev, auxr_info). The refcount operation (auxiliary_device_init/uninit) is just one step within broader business logic.
